# Ningbo Yinrui Biomedical Instruments Co., Ltd — Complete Product & Company Information

> Manufacturer of the CarryOn portable PCR analyzer platform — palm-sized, battery-powered molecular diagnostics for veterinary clinics, pathogen detection, and food safety testing. Founded by BGI co-founder Dr. Yu Jun.

---

## Company Overview

Ningbo Yinrui Biomedical Instruments Co., Ltd (Yinrui Bio) is a high-precision instrument manufacturer specializing in portable molecular diagnostics. The company's core technical team is composed of experts and scholars from the Chinese Academy of Sciences, dedicated to R&D and manufacturing of advanced molecular detection technologies and equipment in life sciences and precision medicine.

- **Founded**: June 2018 in Cixi, Zhejiang, China
- **Founder**: Dr. Yu Jun — NYU Biomedical PhD, co-founder of BGI (Beijing Genomics Institute)
- **Employees**: 69 (including 6 PhDs, 12 Masters)
- **Facility**: ~3,000m2 of laboratory space and GMP workshops
- **IP Portfolio**: 62 patents, 12 design patents, 6 software copyrights
- **Certifications**: CE (device + reagent kits), ISO13485, National High-Tech Enterprise, Ningbo "Specialized & Innovative" SME
- **Strategic Partner**: Zhejiang Orient Gene Biotech (since 2023)

### Founder Background

Dr. Yu Jun, Chairman:
- NYU School of Medicine, Biomedical PhD (1984-1990)
- Co-founder of BGI (Beijing Genomics Institute) (1999-2008)
- Distinguished Researcher & Founding Vice Director, Beijing Institute of Genomics, CAS (2003-2013)
- Scientific American inaugural Global Science Leader of the Year (2002)
- CAS Hundred Talents Program (2002)
- Chief Scientist, National 973 Program (2006-2016)

### Company Milestones

- 2018.06: Founded in Cixi, Zhejiang
- 2018.12: Digital PCR project selected for Ningbo "S&T Innovation 2025" biomedical program
- 2019.07: Undertook National Key R&D Program "S&T Winter Olympics" — handheld qPCR project
- 2020.01: COVID-19 border control emergency technology research; selected for MOST "S&T Boosting Economy 2020"
- 2021.05: Co-founded Cixi Life Science Innovation Research Institute with Cixi government
- 2022.04: ISO13485 certified; CarryOn device & reagents received EU CE certification
- 2023.03: Strategic partnership with Zhejiang Orient Gene Biotech
- 2024.12: Recognized as National High-Tech Enterprise
- 2025.06: Recognized as Ningbo "Specialized & Innovative" SME

---

## CarryOn Portable PCR Analyzer

### Device Overview

The CarryOn is a fully automated, closed-system nucleic acid amplification analyzer. It automatically completes sample nucleic acid extraction, purification, and real-time fluorescence PCR amplification. Paired with dedicated microfluidic chips, it detects nucleic acid targets in specimens and provides instant test reports via its embedded touchscreen system.

### Key Advantages

1. **Truly Portable**: Handheld, battery-powered (3.5 hour runtime). Use anywhere — clinics, farms, shelters, border checkpoints, field stations.
2. **PCR-Level Accuracy**: Real-time fluorescence PCR, the gold standard in molecular diagnostics. Sensitivity: 50 copies/test. Reproducibility: CV <= 3%.
3. **Zero Learning Curve**: Fully automated closed system. Sample in, result out. No training, no lab environment required.
4. **No Cold Chain**: All test chips store at room temperature (15-30C). No refrigeration needed.
5. **Fast Results**: Complete results in under 60 minutes (typically 40 minutes).

### Full Technical Specifications

| Specification | Value |
|---------------|-------|
| Product Name | Fully Automated Closed Nucleic Acid Amplification System |
| Dimensions | 297 x 159 x 126 mm |
| Weight | 2.0 kg |
| Detection Channels | 5-color fluorescence |
| Time to Result | < 60 minutes |
| Power Supply | Rechargeable lithium battery (~3.5 hours runtime) |
| Sample Types | Swabs, swab preservative fluid, blood, saliva |
| Consumables | Pre-loaded microfluidic chips |
| Heating Rate | 6C/s |
| Cooling Rate | 4.5C/s |
| Software | Proprietary touchscreen OS & analysis software |
| Sensitivity | 50 copies/test |
| Environment | Room temperature (field-deployable) |
| Connectivity | WiFi |
| Reproducibility | CV <= 3% |
| Certifications | CE, ISO13485 |

### How It Works

1. **Load Sample**: Add the sample (swab, blood, etc.) to the microfluidic chip
2. **Insert Chip**: Place the chip into the CarryOn device
3. **Auto Process**: Automated extraction, purification, and PCR amplification
4. **Read Result**: Get PCR-accurate results in 40 minutes on the touchscreen

---

## Test Chip Catalog

All test chips are single-use, closed-system microfluidic chips. Room temperature storage (15-30C), 12-month shelf life.

### Canine Diagnostics

#### Canine CDV-CPV-CCoV Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Canine Distemper Virus (CDV), Canine Parvovirus (CPV), Canine Coronavirus (CCoV)
- **Sample**: Oronasal swab, rectal swab
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Routine health check screening

#### Canine CPIV-CAV-CIV Respiratory Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Canine Parainfluenza Virus (CPIV), Canine Adenovirus (CAV), Canine Influenza Virus (CIV)
- **Sample**: Nasal swab
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Dogs with coughing, sneezing, nasal discharge

#### Canine Babesia-Ehrlichia-Leptospira Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Babesia canis, Ehrlichia canis, Leptospira spp.
- **Sample**: Whole blood
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Dogs with tick exposure history

### Feline Diagnostics

#### Feline FHV-FCV-Mycoplasma Respiratory Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Feline Herpesvirus (FHV-1), Feline Calicivirus (FCV), Mycoplasma felis
- **Sample**: Oronasal swab
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Cats with unexplained respiratory symptoms

#### Feline FeLV-FIV-FPV Screening Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Feline Leukemia Virus (FeLV), Feline Immunodeficiency Virus (FIV), Feline Panleukopenia Virus (FPV)
- **Sample**: Whole blood
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Shelter intake screening, routine health checks

### Human Pathogen Detection

#### Influenza A/B + SARS-CoV-2 Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Influenza A Virus, Influenza B Virus, SARS-CoV-2
- **Sample**: Nasopharyngeal swab
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Clinical triage, border control, epidemic prevention

#### Mycoplasma + RSV + Adenovirus Respiratory Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Mycoplasma pneumoniae, Respiratory Syncytial Virus (RSV), Adenovirus
- **Sample**: Nasopharyngeal swab
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Pediatric clinics, hospitals

#### Chlamydia + Ureaplasma + Gonorrhea STI Triple Test Chip
- **Targets**: Chlamydia trachomatis (CT), Ureaplasma urealyticum (UU), Neisseria gonorrhoeae (NG)
- **Sample**: Urogenital swab
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Point-of-care STI screening

### Livestock Diagnostics

#### African Swine Fever (ASF) Test Chip
- **Target**: African Swine Fever Virus (ASFV)
- **Sample**: Whole blood, tissue homogenate
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Farm surveillance, border quarantine, slaughterhouse screening

#### Porcine PRRSV (Blue Ear) Test Chip
- **Target**: Porcine Reproductive and Respiratory Syndrome Virus (PRRSV)
- **Sample**: Whole blood, serum
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Swine herd health monitoring

### Meat Species Identification

#### Beef-Pork-Chicken-Duck Quad Test Chip
- **Targets**: Cattle (Bos taurus), Swine (Sus scrofa), Chicken (Gallus gallus), Duck (Anas)
- **Sample**: Raw or processed meat tissue
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Food safety enforcement, Halal/Kosher compliance, anti-adulteration

#### Lamb-Pork-Chicken-Duck Quad Test Chip
- **Targets**: Sheep (Ovis aries), Swine, Chicken, Duck
- **Sample**: Raw or processed meat tissue
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Lamb adulteration detection

#### Donkey-Horse-Pork-Duck Quad Test Chip
- **Targets**: Donkey (Equus asinus), Horse (Equus caballus), Swine, Duck
- **Sample**: Raw or processed meat tissue
- **Time**: < 60 minutes
- **Use case**: Customs enforcement, cross-border meat fraud detection

---

## Technology: CarryOn vs Traditional Methods

| Feature | CarryOn | Lab PCR | Rapid Antigen |
|---------|---------|---------|---------------|
| Time to Result | 40 min | 24-72 hrs | 10-15 min |
| Accuracy | PCR-level (>99%) | PCR-level | Lower |
| Equipment Cost | $$ | $$$$ | $ |
| Training Required | None | Extensive | Minimal |
| Lab Environment | Not needed | Required | Not needed |
| Reagent Storage | Room temp | Cold chain | Room temp |
| Portability | Handheld | Fixed lab | Handheld |

---

## Three Core Application Scenarios

### 1. Companion Animal Diagnostics
Rapid PCR testing for Parvo, FIP, Distemper, CDV, and more. Results in 40 minutes at the point of care. Ideal for veterinary clinics, animal shelters, and breeding facilities.

### 2. Pathogen Detection
Field-deployable detection for influenza, African swine fever, respiratory pathogens, and STIs. Suitable for clinical settings, border control, epidemic prevention, and farm surveillance.

### 3. Meat Species Identification
On-site DNA testing to identify beef, pork, lamb, horse, donkey, chicken, and duck meat species. Detect adulteration in 40 minutes. Essential for food safety enforcement, Halal/Kosher compliance, and customs inspection.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Q: How accurate is the CarryOn PCR system?
A: CarryOn uses real-time fluorescence PCR, the gold standard in molecular diagnostics. Clinical validation shows sensitivity and specificity comparable to laboratory-grade PCR systems (>99%).

### Q: Do I need special training to use it?
A: No. CarryOn is designed for anyone -- just load the sample into the chip, insert it into the device, and wait 40 minutes for results. No laboratory training required.

### Q: How should the test chips be stored?
A: All CarryOn test chips can be stored at room temperature (15-30C). No refrigeration or cold chain logistics needed, making them ideal for field use and remote clinics. Shelf life: 12 months.

### Q: What diseases can CarryOn detect?
A: Current panels include canine (Parvovirus, Distemper, Coronavirus, tick-borne diseases), feline (FHV, FCV, FeLV/FIV/FPV), pathogen detection (influenza, COVID, respiratory pathogens, STIs, ASF, PRRSV), and meat species identification (beef, pork, lamb, chicken, duck, horse, donkey).

### Q: Is CarryOn CE certified?
A: Yes. Both the CarryOn device and test chips hold CE certification. The company also maintains ISO13485 quality management system certification.

### Q: Can I become a distributor?
A: Yes, we are actively seeking distribution partners worldwide. Please contact us through the inquiry form or WhatsApp to discuss partnership opportunities.
